title: UPDATE 3 Vote UNIT 01 in the FINALS WE CAN WIN THIS
display_title: UPDATE 3 Vote UNIT 01 in the FINALS WE CAN WIN THIS
wikitext:
[]: UPDATE 3: Vote UNIT-01 in the FINALS! WE CAN WIN THIS!!             Quote Post by Aftershok » Sat Apr 16, 2011 5:02 pm FINALS UPDATE: It's been quite the uphill battle for Unit-01 and Evangelion fans everywhere, but it's at last time for the final showdown. We've made it too far to lose this against the Zaku-II now. One last hurrah will win the whole thing for Yui-sama, the coveted title of Sai-Mecha Champion! But it's not up to me or to you. It's up to all of us. This is a collective effort, and I'd like to thank you all for helping to carry the Test Type to the finals. I only ask for one final favor, friends: Vote! Every single vote counts. If you've taken the time to click through to here, please click below and vote for dat purple robot. [url]http://saimecha.wordpress.com/2011/06/13/it-all-comes-down-to-this-the-final-round-of-the-super-dimensional-robot-tournament-sai-mecha-2011/[/url] With all of us (and even the noble Xard) working together, we can win this for Evangelion!! Hurry! Polls close after 11:59PM EST Thursday the 16th! ------------------------------------ UPDATE: It's crunch time for everyone's favorite purple mecha. Our opponent this time around is the venerable YF-1 Valkyrie. Mutinies will be dealt with harshly. Don't turn your back on Yui, or else Gendou will have a quiet word with you in the back room. Will the semifinals go as smoothly for Unit-01? YOU DECIDE. Ready? FIGHT! [url]http://saimecha.wordpress.com/2011/05/26/nevar-fourget-how-this-awful-pun-is-inversely-proportional-to-how-awesome-the-sai-mecha-semifinals-is/[/url] ------------------------------------ UPDATE: All right, guys, it's round two of the Sai-Mecha Tourney. This time Unit01 is going up against Gunbuster and Unit02 has the VF-10 Valkyrie to contend with. I think these are pretty tough matchups, but I think the Evas can pull it off. Unit02 in particular is gonna have a hard time considering all the Macrossfags over there. You know what to do: [url]http://saimecha.wordpress.com/2011/05/05/sai-mecha-round-2-everybody-hurts/[/url] Thanks. ------------------------------------ Been a long-time lurker on these boards, but thought this was important enough to post to get the word out. There's an internet-wide mecha popularity contest called the "Sai-Mecha Tournament" where folks vote for their favorite robots in a series of predetermined matchups to end up with a "champion". I just wanted to give the nudge toward this great community to vote for the mechs we all know and love. Unit-01 in particular may need a leg up against the VF-25 from Macross! Please vote! I love Eva too much to let it lose to some wussy Macross junk. Link: [url]http://saimecha.wordpress.com/2011/04/13/sai-mecha-round-1-earth-side/[/url] Thanks! Edit: Fixed Macross mech name thanks to Xard.[url][/url]

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Sat Apr 16, 2011 5:58 pm What? No 00 or 04?! *sulky sulky sulk sulk* Even though Evangelion is the only humungous mecha series I've ever seen - though I do plan to see TTGL and Gunbuster - I went ahead and voted for EVA-01, EVA-02, and Gunbuster, simply because they're Gainax. Yay, Gainax.

[]: Re: Vote Evangelion in the Sai-Mecha Tourney!             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Apr 16, 2011 6:32 pm Aftershok wrote: Unit-01 in particular may need a leg up against the VF-28 from Macross! Please vote! I love Eva too much to let it lose to some wussy Macross junk. Link: [url]http://saimecha.wordpress.com/2011/04/13/sai-mecha-round-1-earth-side/[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sat Apr 16, 2011 7:24 pm What? No YF-19? Pffffffffft. Unit 01 all the way.

[]:             Quote Post by Aftershok » Sat Apr 16, 2011 9:11 pm @TehDonutKing Keep in mind that this is only half the bracket. There's a chance 00 and 04 will appear in the other side of the tournament. There was a nomination process a few weeks ago where you could email in your favorite 15 mechs for stat compilations for seeding and stuff, but it's obviously too late for that :P @Xard Thanks for the correction, no thanks for the Unit-01 betrayal. @InstrumentalityOne Like I mentioned to Donut, only half the bracket. Great success on the Unit-01 vote.

[]:             Quote Post by braveheart » Sun Apr 17, 2011 5:36 am Voting...

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Sun Apr 17, 2011 1:19 pm You know, you can vote again by refreshing the page. I wonder how many ballot stuffing programs have been written for this site.

[]:             Quote Post by Aftershok » Sun Apr 17, 2011 5:22 pm I don't know if you're using a constantly-randomizing proxy, but, actually, you can't. It says "Thank you, we have already counted your vote" if you try to vote a second time. Highly doubt the voting mechanism lets you do that, but who am I to say? :P

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Apr 17, 2011 6:13 pm It lets me vote over and over again, from the same IP. Of course, I never accepted the cookie from the site.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Sun Apr 17, 2011 7:08 pm I voted for Unit 01 but not Unit 02, because the NZ-666 looks damned awesome (wherever its from) .

[]: Re: Vote Evangelion in the Sai-Mecha Tourney!             Quote Post by Combs » Sun Apr 17, 2011 11:38 pm Xard wrote: Tough choice but in the end VFs are frickin' transforming fighter jets and jets are cooler than giant robots to begin with.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Apr 18, 2011 12:15 am That isn't fighter jet. That transportation method still looks like SHIT - only harpies do that decently VFs gonna VF

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Mon Apr 18, 2011 6:25 pm I also think gerwalk looks hilarious.

[]: Re: Vote Evangelion in the Sai-Mecha Tourney!             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Apr 19, 2011 2:13 pm Aftershok wrote: I love Eva too much to let it lose to some wussy Macross junk.

[]:             Quote Post by Aftershok » Tue Apr 19, 2011 6:57 pm ...aaand the results are in! [url]http://saimecha.wordpress.com/2011/04/19/round-1-earth-side-results/#more-112[/url] Good show, all! Looks like we managed to carry through both the Evas this round. Just a note: Don't vote multiple times! Rallying your fellow Evangelion troops is one thing, but voting more than once is just plain cheating no matter how you look at it. Here's one for Yui and Kyoko.

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Wed Apr 20, 2011 4:04 am Even though Xard nearly foiled our plans... you bastard

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Wed Apr 20, 2011 6:41 am

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Wed Apr 20, 2011 7:10 am Everyone I voted for won. This is huh... wow.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Apr 26, 2011 1:59 pm toe mash wrote: Even though Xard nearly foiled our plans... you bastard

[]:             Quote Post by Aftershok » Thu May 05, 2011 8:06 pm So the round two voting is live! Go vote for Evangelion (or not)!
